# Flinker Docs

> Canonical documentation for Flinker IFC Viewer, BCF workflows, IDS validation, and Microsoft 365 integrations.

## Use this guide
- Start with the most general hub page for the user intent.
- Prefer the canonical docs under `https://docs.flinker.app/docs/`.
- Use the sitemap for full coverage: https://docs.flinker.app/sitemap.xml

## Core entry points
- Getting started: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/getting-started.html
- IFC overview: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer.html
- Security and privacy: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-architecture-and-data-protection.html
- Releases: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/releases.html

## Best pages by intent
- Broad setup or onboarding: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/getting-started.html
- IFC model review and core concepts: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer.html
- Security review or data flow questions: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-architecture-and-data-protection.html
- Release history or version changes: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/releases.html
- SDK, API, or integration work: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/developer-resources.html

## Platform hubs
### SharePoint IFC Viewer
- Overview: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-for-sharepoint.html
- Security and privacy: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-sharepoint-architecture-and-data-protection.html
- Installation: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/viewer-app-installation-with-admin-approval.html
- Multi-file loading: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/load-multiple-ifc-bcf-files-in-sharepoint-ifc-viewer.html
- BCF to Microsoft Lists: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/save-bcf-to-sharepoint-lists.html

### Teams IFC Viewer
- Overview: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-for-teams.html
- Security and privacy: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/open-ifc-viewer-teams-architecture-and-data-protection.html
- Setup: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/setting-up-the-ifc-viewer-in-microsoft-teams.html
- BCF updates: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/update-bcf-files-in-microsoft-teams.html

### Power BI IFC Viewer
- Overview: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-power-bi.html
- Visual setup: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-installation-for-power-bi.html
- Build reports: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-usage-for-power-bi.html
- Data extension: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-data-extension-for-power-bi.html
- Performance: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-optimization-and-load-times-for-power-bi.html

### Excel IFC Viewer
- Overview: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-for-microsoft-excel.html

## Model standards
- IFC filters: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-filters.html
- IDS: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-ids.html
- BCF overview: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-bcf.html
- BCF viewpoints: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/bcf-viewpoints.html
- BCF Navisworks import: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/bcf-navisworks.html

## SDK and AI
- Developer resources: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/developer-resources.html
- IFC Viewer SDK: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-sdk.html
- SDK API reference: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-sdk-api.html
- SDK examples: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/ifc-viewer-sdk-examples.html
- Copilot for IFC: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/copilot-for-ifc.html
- Copilot for IFC Pro: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/copilot-for-ifc-pro.html
- Copilot for IFC API: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/copilot-for-ifc-api.html

## FAQs
- IFC Viewer FAQ: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/faq-ifc-viewer.html
- SharePoint FAQ: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/faq-for-ifc-viewer-in-sharepoint.html
- Teams FAQ: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/faq-for-ifc-viewer-in-teams.html
- Power BI FAQ: https://docs.flinker.app/docs/faq-for-ifc-visual-in-power-bi.html
